name: Aunt Pajama's Pancake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In an 8-cup container, stir together the flour, Bisquick, sugar, and creamer.
2. Cover tightly and refrigerate the mix to use within 3 months.
- Makes 7 cups of mix.
To Use the Mix:
1. Into a blender, put one egg, 8 ounces of 7-Up, and prepared pancake mix.
2. Blend at high speed until smooth, about 1 minute.
3. Allow 1/3 cup batter for each 6-inch pancake.
- Makes 8 pancakes.
